_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 14:54:30Z)**_

明白。将 context value 改为恒定的 atom 引用，消费端用 `useAtomValue` 按需订阅，避免全量 re-render。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 14:54:51Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client'

import type { AggregateTop, NoteModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import type { Atom } from 'jotai'
import { atom, useAtomValue, useSetAtom } from 'jotai'
import { useLocale } from 'next-intl'
import { createContext, use, useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'

import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
import { useAppConfigSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
import { navigation } from '~/queries/definition/navigation'

import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'
import { headerMenuConfig as baseHeaderMenuConfig } from '../config'
import type { HeaderCategoryNavItem } from './nav-menu-data'
import { applyDynamicHeaderMenuData } from './nav-menu-data'
import { getRecentNotesQueryOptions } from './recent-notes-query'

type MenuType = 'Home' | 'Post' | 'Note' | 'Timeline'

type RecentNoteFields = Pick<NoteModel, 'nid' | 'title' | 'created' | 'slug'>

interface HeaderConfigContextValue {
  configAtom: Atom<IHeaderMenu[]>
  categoriesAtom: Atom<HeaderCategoryNavItem[] | null>
  topicsAtom: Atom<{ slug: string; name: string; icon?: string }[] | null>
  recentNotesAtom: Atom<RecentNoteFields[] | null>
  topDataAtom: Atom<AggregateTop | null>
  ensureMenuData: (type: MenuType) => void
}

const HeaderMenuConfigContext = createContext<HeaderConfigContextValue>(
  null as any,
)

export const useHeaderConfig = () => use(HeaderMenuConfigContext)

export const useHeaderConfigValue = <K extends keyof Omit<HeaderConfigContextValue, 'ensureMenuData'>>(
  key: K,
) => {
  const ctx = useHeaderConfig()
  return useAtomValue(ctx[key])
}

export const HeaderDataConfigureProvider: Component = ({ children }) => {
  const locale = useLocale()
  const postListViewMode = useAppConfigSelector(
    (appConfig) => appConfig.module?.posts?.mode,
  )
  const [shouldLoadHomeMenu, setShouldLoadHomeMenu] = useState(false)
  const [shouldLoadPostMenu, setShouldLoadPostMenu] = useState(false)
  const [shouldLoadNoteMenu, setShouldLoadNoteMenu] = useState(false)
  const [shouldLoadTimelineMenu, setShouldLoadTimelineMenu] = useState(false)

  const [atoms] = useState(() => ({
    configAtom: atom<IHeaderMenu[]>(baseHeaderMenuConfig),
    categoriesAtom: atom<HeaderCategoryNavItem[] | null>(null),
    topicsAtom: atom<{ slug: string; name: string; icon?: string }[] | null>(null),
    recentNotesAtom: atom<RecentNoteFields[] | null>(null),
    topDataAtom: atom<AggregateTop | null>(null),
  }))

  const { data: pages } = useQuery({
    ...navigation.pages(locale),
    enabled: shouldLoadHomeMenu,
  })

  const { data: postMenuData } = useQuery({
    ...navigation.posts(locale),
    enabled: shouldLoadPostMenu,
  })

  const { data: topicsData } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['nav-topics'],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const data = await apiClient.topic.getAll()
      return data.$serialized.data as { slug: string; name: string; icon?: string }[]
    },
    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 10,
    enabled: shouldLoadNoteMenu,
  })

  const { data: noteListData } = useQuery({
    ...getRecentNotesQueryOptions(locale, apiClient),
    enabled: shouldLoadNoteMenu,
  })

  const { data: topData } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['nav-top'],
    queryFn: async () =>
      (await apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)).$serialized as AggregateTop,
    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
    enabled: shouldLoadTimelineMenu,
  })

  const categories = postMenuData?.categories || null
  const topics = topicsData || null
  const recentNotes = (noteListData?.data as RecentNoteFields[] | undefined) || null

  const setConfig = useSetAtom(atoms.configAtom)
  const setCategories = useSetAtom(atoms.categoriesAtom)
  const setTopics = useSetAtom(atoms.topicsAtom)
  const setRecentNotes = useSetAtom(atoms.recentNotesAtom)
  const setTopData = useSetAtom(atoms.topDataAtom)

  useEffect(() => {
    setConfig(
      applyDynamicHeaderMenuData(baseHeaderMenuConfig, {
        categories,
        pages,
        postListViewMode,
      }),
    )
  }, [categories, pages, postListViewMode, setConfig])

  useEffect(() => {
    setCategories(categories)
  }, [categories, setCategories])

  useEffect(() => {
    setTopics(topics)
  }, [topics, setTopics])

  useEffect(() => {
    setRecentNotes(recentNotes)
  }, [recentNotes, setRecentNotes])

  useEffect(() => {
    setTopData(topData || null)
  }, [topData, setTopData])

  const ensureMenuData = useCallback((type: MenuType) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'Home': {
        setShouldLoadHomeMenu(true)
        break
      }
      case 'Post': {
        setShouldLoadPostMenu(true)
        break
      }
      case 'Note': {
        setShouldLoadNoteMenu(true)
        break
      }
      case 'Timeline': {
        setShouldLoadTimelineMenu(true)
        break
      }
    }
  }, [])

  const [ctxValue] = useState(() => ({
    ...atoms,
    ensureMenuData,
  }))

  return (
    <HeaderMenuConfigContext value={ctxValue}>
      {children}
    </HeaderMenuConfigContext>
  )
}

```

     1→'use client'

     5→import { NavigationMenu } from '@base-ui/react/navigation-menu'
     6→import { AnimatePresence, LayoutGroup, m } from 'motion/react'
     7→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     8→import * as React from 'react'
     9→import { useCallback, useState } from 'react'
    10→
    11→import { RootPortal } from '~/components/ui/portal'
    12→import useDebounceValue from '~/hooks/common/use-debounce-value'
    13→import { Link, usePathname } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    14→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    15→import { useIsScrollUpAndPageIsOver } from '~/providers/root/page-scroll-info-provider'
    16→
    17→import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'
    18→import { dropdownTypeMap } from './DropdownContents'
    19→import { useHeaderConfig } from './HeaderDataConfigureProvider'
    20→import { useMenuOpacity } from './hooks'
    21→
    22→/** Debug: prevent menu from closing on focus loss (e.g. when opening DevTools). Enable via ?nav_debug=1 or localStorage.nav_debug */
    23→const useNavDebugMode = () => {
    24→  const [debug] = useState(() => {
    25→    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return false
    26→    return (
    27→      new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('nav_debug') === '1' ||
    28→      !!localStorage.getItem('nav_debug')
    29→    )
    30→  })
    31→  return debug
    32→}
    33→
    34→const NavSeparator = () => (
    35→  <div className="h-3.5 w-px shrink-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-black/[0.06] to-transparent dark:via-white/[0.06]" />
    36→)
    37→
    38→export const HeaderContent = () => (
    39→  <LayoutGroup>
    40→    <AnimatedMenu>
    41→      <ForDesktop />
    42→    </AnimatedMenu>
    43→    <AccessibleMenu />
    44→  </LayoutGroup>
    45→)
    46→
    47→const AccessibleMenu: Component = () => {
    48→  const showShow = useDebounceValue(useIsScrollUpAndPageIsOver(600), 120)
    49→  return (
    50→    <RootPortal>
    51→      <AnimatePresence>
    52→        {showShow && (
    53→          <m.div
    54→            animate={{ y: 0 }}
    55→            className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-x-0 top-4 z-10 mr-[var(--removed-body-scroll-bar-size)] flex justify-center"
    56→            exit={{ y: -20, opacity: 0 }}
    57→            initial={{ y: -20 }}
    58→          >
    59→            <ForDesktop />
    60→          </m.div>
    61→        )}
    62→      </AnimatePresence>
    63→    </RootPortal>
    64→  )
    65→}
    66→
    67→const AnimatedMenu: Component = ({ children }) => {
    68→  const opacity = useMenuOpacity()
    69→
    70→  const shouldHideNavBg = opacity === 0
    71→  return (
    72→    <m.div
    73→      className="duration-100"
    74→      style={{
    75→        opacity,
    76→        visibility: opacity === 0 ? 'hidden' : 'visible',
    77→      }}
    78→    >
    79→      {/* @ts-ignore */}
    80→      {React.cloneElement(children, { shouldHideNavBg })}
    81→    </m.div>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→
    85→const ForDesktop: Component<{
    86→  shouldHideNavBg?: boolean
    87→  animatedIcon?: boolean
    88→}> = ({ className, shouldHideNavBg, animatedIcon = true }) => {
    89→  const { config: headerMenuConfig, ensureMenuData } = useHeaderConfig()
    90→  const pathname = usePathname()
    91→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    92→  const navDebugMode = useNavDebugMode()
    93→
    94→  const [menuValue, setMenuValue] = useState<string | null>(null)
    95→  const handleValueChange = useCallback(
    96→    (value: string | null) => {
    97→      if (navDebugMode && value == null) return
    98→      if (value) {
    99→        const section = headerMenuConfig.find((item) => item.path === value)
   100→        if (section?.type) {
   101→          ensureMenuData(section.type as Parameters<typeof ensureMenuData>[0])
   102→        }
   103→      }
   104→      setMenuValue(value)
   105→    },
   106→    [ensureMenuData, headerMenuConfig, navDebugMode],
   107→  )
   108→
   109→  const getTitle = useCallback(
   110→    (item: IHeaderMenu) => {
   111→      if (item.titleKey) {
   112→        return t(item.titleKey as any)
   113→      }
   114→      return item.title
   115→    },
   116→    [t],
   117→  )
   118→
   119→  return (
   120→    <NavigationMenu.Root
   121→      closeDelay={150}
   122→      delay={80}
   123→      render={<m.nav layout="size" />}
   124→      value={menuValue}
   125→      className={clsxm(
   126→        'relative',
   127→        'rounded-sm',
   128→        'bg-white/[0.38] dark:bg-neutral-900/[0.38] backdrop-blur-lg',
   129→        'border border-[rgba(200,180,160,0.08)] dark:border-neutral-700/20',
   130→        'pointer-events-auto duration-200',
   131→        shouldHideNavBg && 'bg-none! border-transparent!',
   132→        className,
   133→      )}
   134→      onValueChange={handleValueChange}
   135→    >
   136→      <NavigationMenu.List className="flex list-none items-center px-2 font-medium text-neutral-9">
   137→        {headerMenuConfig.map((section, index) => {
   138→          const DropdownContent = section.type
   139→            ? dropdownTypeMap[section.type]
   140→            : undefined
   141→
   142→          const subItemActive =
   143→            section.subMenu?.findIndex(
   144→              (item) =>
   145→                item.path === pathname ||
   146→                pathname.slice(1) === item.path ||
   147→                pathname.startsWith(`${item.path}/`),
   148→            ) ?? -1
   149→
   150→          const isActive =
   151→            pathname === section.path ||
   152→            (pathname.startsWith(`${section.path}/`) &&
   153→              !section.exclude?.includes(pathname)) ||
   154→            subItemActive > -1 ||
   155→            false
   156→
   157→          const activeSubItem = section.subMenu?.[subItemActive]
   158→
   159→          let href = section.path
   160→          if (section.search) {
   161→            href += `?${new URLSearchParams(section.search).toString()}`
   162→          }
   163→
   164→          const activeClass =

   168→          let menuItem: React.ReactNode

   202→          } else {

   205→              <NavigationMenu.Item>
   206→                <NavigationMenu.Link
   207→                  active={isActive}
   208→                  className={clsxm(
   209→                    'relative block whitespace-nowrap px-3 py-1.5 transition duration-200',
   210→                    isActive ? activeClass : inactiveClass,
   211→                  )}
   212→                  render={

   217→                    )
   218→                  }
   219→                >
   220→                  <span className="relative flex items-center">

   225→                      >
   226→                        {activeSubItem?.icon ?? section.icon}

   228→                    )}

   232→                        : getTitle(section)}
   233→                    </m.span>
   234→                  </span>
   235→                </NavigationMenu.Link>
   236→              </NavigationMenu.Item>
   237→            )
   238→          }
   239→
   240→          return (

   242→              {index > 0 && <NavSeparator />}
   243→              {menuItem}
   244→            </React.Fragment>
   245→          )
   246→        })}
   247→      </NavigationMenu.List>
   248→
   249→      <NavigationMenu.Portal>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 14:56:15Z)**_

完成。总结变更：

**`HeaderDataConfigureProvider.tsx`** — context value 改为恒定对象，内含 5 个 jotai `atom`（`configAtom`、`categoriesAtom`、`topicsAtom`、`recentNotesAtom`、`topDataAtom`）+ `ensureMenuData` 回调。atom 在 `useState` 初始化器中创建（per-instance 稳定），query 数据通过 `useSetAtom` + `useEffect` 同步至 atom。context value 永不变更，消费端按需订阅，避免全量 re-render。

新增 `useHeaderConfigValue(key)` hook，内部 `useAtomValue(ctx[key])` 取值。

**消费端**（`HeaderContent`、`DropdownContents`、`HeaderDrawerContent`）— 原 `useHeaderConfig()` 解构取值改为 `useHeaderConfigValue('xxxAtom')` 按需订阅，仅 `ensureMenuData` 仍从 `useHeaderConfig()` 取。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 15:03:10Z)**_

Lint 通过。变更：

1. 移除 `HeaderDrawerContent` 中 mount 时立即调 `ensureMenuData('Home')` / `ensureMenuData('Post')` 的 `useEffect`
2. `toggleSection` 改为接收 `type` 参数，展开时才调 `ensureMenuData`
3. 所有 header Link 已设 `prefetch={false}`

如此，页面加载时不会触发任何导航数据查询，仅在用户 hover（桌面端 dropdown 展开）或 tap（移动端抽屉展开）时才加载。
